name: wxcode-admin-dense-grid
title: Dense Grid Admin
description: High-density dark-mode operations dashboard in the trading-desk style — compact rows, monospace tabular figures, color-coded deltas, watchlist, positions table, order book, sparkline strip, and stats row. Maximum information per pixel with a 4-px spacing grid.

query.en: Build a high-density dark-mode operations dashboard — trading-desk style with compact watchlist, positions table, order book, sparkline strip, and monospace tabular figures.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Build a high-density dark-mode operations dashboard — trading-desk style with compact watchlist, positions table, order book, sparkline strip, and monospace tabular figures.

provenance.note: original archetype; no third-party template reproduced
